'''Garollian ghost vipers''' were [[Species/Legends|creatures]]<ref name="ROTS" /> native to a location within the [[Garollia system/Legends|Garollia system]]<ref name="Planetnamia" /> of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Baroli sector/Legends|Baroli sector]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> The [[Ghost (folklore)/Legends|ghost]] vipers had [[Tongue/Legends|tongues]] that they could move rapidly. While engaged in a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duel]] against the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] during the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Separatist attack]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]<ref name="ROTS" /> in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] mentally compared Kenobi's [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber attacks]] to the quick movement of a ghost viper's tongue.<ref name="ROTS" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Garollian ghost viper was first mentioned in the [[2005]] [[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|novelization]] of the [[Prequel trilogy|film]] [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']], which was written by [[Matthew Stover]].<ref name="ROTS" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith'' novelization]] {{Ab|Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm}}
